description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle, visually reminiscent of the AK-47, featuring a combination of dark metal and wood textures. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are rendered in a warm, natural wood tone, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are finished in matte black metal. The rifle has a fixed wooden stock and a curved detachable box magazine, typical of this firearm style. Iron sights are present at both the front and rear, with the front sight post and rear notch clearly visible. The barrel is standard length, ending in a simple muzzle device. The overall design is utilitarian, robust, and iconic, suitable for urban environments or military scenarios.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. Features iron sights and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, and the other side of the curved magazine.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
